MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER CLARISSE TAN Motion For Attornes Fees

No appearance.

The court adopted its tentative ruling on PETITIONER CLARISSE TAN'S Motion For Attornes Fees.

Petitioner's unopposed "motion for attorneys' fees" is granted in the amount of $16,770.50.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)

Seventh Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CLARISSE TAN'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Clarisse Tan's unopposed "petition to confirm contractual arbitration award" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the hearing.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
